title: Tart Beef Empanadas
description: Moist beef and tangy tart filling wrapped in crispy empanada dough. A classic Argentinian snack.

ingredients.name: tart
ingredients.notes: Diced fresh tart (such as lemon or lime)

instructions: In a large bowl, mix together flour, salt, and sugar
Gradually add water and mix until dough forms
Knead dough for 5 minutes and let rest for 30 minutes
Divide dough into 8 equal pieces and roll out each piece into a thin circle
Place 1 tablespoon beef and 1/4 teaspoon tart in center of each circle
Brush edges with olive oil and fold dough over filling to form a triangle
Press edges to seal and use a fork to crimp
Brush tops with beaten egg and bake for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown
